Anastasia D. Green

Game Developer | XR Designer | 3D Artist

🚀 My portfolio website!

I like to build stuff. Hopefully you'll see it someday

About

Hi, call me Ana!

I'm a 24 year old game developer, extended reality designer, and 3D artist! I am currently living in Brooklyn, New York, and have recently completed my MS in Integrated Design & Media, at NYU Tandon. Before that, I graduated from TCNJ, where I majored in Interactive Multimedia with a minor in Women, Gender, & Sexuality Studies. I enjoy programming and creating art, and have been playing, studying, and creating games for years!

I loves solving puzzles, and I'm passionate about designing games, other interactive experiences, and bringing digital worlds to life!


The best way out is always through
-Robert Frost
